Back to website Python lab Docs index

Setupcfg Examples.Txt

Clean code reading view for studying, copying, and comparing your own implementation.

emergency-path/.venv/Lib/site-packages/setuptools/tests/config/setupcfg_examples.txt
# ====================================================================
# Some popular packages that use setup.cfg (and others not so popular)
# Reference: https://hugovk.github.io/top-pypi-packages/
# ====================================================================
